summary: The implementation successfully delivers all 7 requirements (REQ-26 through REQ-32) for the Home.tsx page with post feed, comments display, and add comment functionality. The diff shows complete implementation of frontend Home.tsx with proper type definitions, automatic polling, comment display, and comment input forms, plus backend addComment function in main.mo with nested comment storage.

hallucinated_features.description: React Query cache invalidation after adding comments (queryClient.invalidateQueries for 'feed' and 'comments')
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest non-goals explicitly state 'Optimistic UI updates for comments (user requested explicit refresh via fetchPosts)'. The implementation includes React Query invalidations which were not requested and go beyond the specified fetchPosts refresh mechanism.

hallucinated_features.description: Comment type in backend includes 'id' field and 'content' field instead of 'text'
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-31 specifies creating a comment record with 'author, text, and createdAt'. REQ-32 specifies Comment type with 'text as string'. The backend implementation uses 'content' field and adds an 'id' field that were not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Backend includes postId field in Comment type
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-31 and REQ-32 do not specify a postId field in the Comment record. Comments are nested within Post records, making postId redundant. The backend adds this unrequested field.
